# Add GitHub Copilot CLI as a Dev Container Feature

## Option 1: Use the Coding Agent to Add the Feature

Select the **Cloud** agent type in the GitHub Copilot Chat UI and enter the following prompt:

```
Add the GitHub Copilot CLI as a devcontainer feature.
```

## Option 2: Use the GitHub.com GitHub Copilot Coding Agent

Navigate to the GitHub.com repository page and open the **Agents** icon in the top-right corner. Navigate to the current repository and enter: 

```
Add the GitHub Copilot CLI as a devcontainer feature.
```
